column1: # Golden canonical URL set (chunk 5, §A4) — the COMPLETE page->url map for fixtures/demo-docs.
# Columns: content file path <TAB> canonical URL (wire form: /docs/ + percent-encoded slug segments).
# Construction: ancestor dir segments + page slug, each through PB-SLUG-1 steps 1-6; page slug from
# api/overview.md -> api-overview) else the filename stem. No `_folder.yaml` slug overrides exist in
# the fixtures. Unicode slugs are NFC and percent-encoded on emit (réunion.md is committed NFD; the
# TreePath boundary normalizes, so the URL is the NFC bytes either way).
# Updating this file = changing a frozen URL surface; review deliberately.
